title: AHZNB´s NarutoOrigins
description: This is an extension of the AHZNB Naruto Mod, Claim 1 of 3 Simulated Origins and Start your new life.  The Mod also adds Life Quality Commands just give it a Try!
body:
- ( [Click on me to join my Mods Testing server where you can get the pre-releases](https://discord.gg/z7YNp8XfJc)) 

- HOW IT WORKS:
- 
- you can only simulate 3 times so choose wisely, editable in the cfgs.
- 
- there are over 28+ Clans to get!
- 
- 1.Use /simulate to generate a Origin
- 2.Claim your chosen Origin.
- 3. Enjoy your new Life!
- 
- 
- 
- Installation Instructions:
- Ensure you have the AHZNB Naruto Mod installed and running on Minecraft Forge 1.12.2.
- Download the Naruto Origins Mod.
- Place the JAR file in your Minecraft mods folder.
- Launch Minecraft and enjoy your new Naruto experience!
- 
- 
- 
- ALL COMMANDS:
- /simulate: Simulate your Origin; you can do this 3 times but can only claim 1.
- /DoItForMe: Sets keepInventory and keepNinjaXP to true.
- /resetMe: Clears your inventory.
- /makeMeAShinobi: Grants you 1 Kunai and 1 Shuriken for the achievement, then after 2 seconds, you receive 10 levels and 300 NinjaXP.
- /viewInv <player>: View the inventory of yourself or another player; you can take items or just observe (Admins only).
- /assignRank you can assign a Rank like Hokage
- /removeRank removes the Rank of a Player
- /checkClan <playername> to see the clan of a player
- /setClan <playername> <list>
- /rerollClan <playername> to reroll your Clan or the Clan of a Player
- the set and reroll Clan commands give the effects after you rejoined
- /iamhim find out if you are "him" [cheat command for people who have custom Clans or Dojutsus, intended for SP! If you own a server just don't let them use it]
- 
- CHANCES:
- 
- Medic: 30% chance to become a Medic.
- Tailed Beast: 7% chance to get a Tailed Beast.
- Rinnegan: 1% chance to get a Rinnegan execpt if u are from the (Uchiha, Hyuga, Senju and Lee Clan)
- Otsusuki: 90% to get the Byakugan, 5% for Sharingan and 5% for Rinnegan
- 
- 
- 
- Future Plans:
- Cursemark stuff included in the Simulations :D
- Dojutsu with abilities 
- Open to suggestions—feel free to share your ideas!
- Singleplayer & Multiplayer Saved Data:
- A folder named NarutoOrigins will be created in your Minecraft World directory.
- Inside the folder, there will be a playerDataNarutoOrigins.json file that saves your command usage to prevent exploiting commands.
- 
- 
- 
- I am on the official Discord server for the AHZNB Naruto Mod, so feel free to reach out if you need any help:
- 
- 
- Discord Link to [My Server](https://discord.com/invite/QcBdcPFqU4)
- Discord: ratja
- [https://discord.com/invite/QcBdcPFqU4](https://discord.com/invite/QcBdcPFqU4)
